message:
🐛 Fix Copilot username in DCO trusted_apps (#114)

The commit author is "Copilot", not "copilot-swe-agent".
- copilot-swe-agent is the PR author (app/copilot-swe-agent)
- Copilot is the commit author (what DCO plugin checks)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -25,9 +25,10 @@ lgtm:
 
 dco:
   kubestellar:  # Org-wide
-    # Trust GitHub Copilot app - skip DCO check for Copilot-authored PRs
+    # Trust GitHub Copilot app - skip DCO check for Copilot-authored commits
+    # Note: commit author is "Copilot", not "copilot-swe-agent" (which is the PR author)
     trusted_apps:
-      - copilot-swe-agent
+      - Copilot
 
 # config_updater will automatically update the config configmap when config.yaml changes
 config_updater:
